===''Pokémon the Series''=== ====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''==== [[File:Bea anime.png|thumb|250px|Bea in {{aniseries|JN}}]] Bea made her animated series debut in ''[[JN034|Solitary and Menacing!]]''. She first battled the [[Koichi|Karate Master]] at the [[Fighting Dojo]] in [[Saffron City]] and won. Soon after, she was challenged to a [[World Coronation Series]] battle by {{Ash}} and had a two-on-two battle with him. She used her {{p|Hawlucha}} and {{p|Grapploct}} to battle {{AP|Farfetch'd}} and {{AP|Riolu}} and emerged victorious without losing a single Pokémon, causing her rank to go up. Bea reappeared in a flashback in ''[[JN036|Making Battles in the Sand!]]''. Bea reappeared in ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', where she was {{pkmn|training}} at the [[Cianwood Gym]] with [[Chuck]] when she received a challenge to a [[rematch]] from Ash. Bea accepted, using her {{p|Hitmontop}} and Grapploct to battle {{AP|Pikachu}} and Riolu. The battle ended with a draw. A silhouette of Bea along with her Grapploct was revealed at the end of ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'', revealing that she had advanced to the Ultra Class of the World Coronation Series. She made a cameo appearance at the end of ''[[JN077|Ultra Exciting from the Shocking Start!]]'' while watching Ash’s World Coronation Series match against [[Volkner]]. During this appearance, she was revealed to possess a [[Dynamax Band]]. In ''[[JN084|An Adventure of Mega Proportions!]]'', Ash was informed that Bea would be his next Ultra Class opponent. Bea reappeared in ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]''. She was shown training with her Pokémon in preparation of her third battle with Ash. After introducing each other to their Pokémon, Ash and Bea enjoyed some sweets with {{an|Korrina}} and [[Goh]]. The next day, the two began their battle, with {{an|Leon}} arriving to spectate and provide commentary. Her battle continued in the [[JN086|next episode]], where she was defeated by Ash's [[Mega Evolution|Mega]] {{AP|Lucario}} despite [[Gigantamax]]ing her {{p|Machamp}}, causing her rank to go down. Later that evening, Bea congratulated Ash on his victory, finally referring to him by his actual name. Bea reappeared in ''[[JN092|The Winding Path to Greatness!]]'', where she was seen leaving Stow-on-Side Stadium with Machamp as Ash, Goh, and [[Allister]] were arriving to try Gigantamaxing {{AP|Gengar}}. The next day, she returned to the stadium in time to witness Ash successfully Gigantamax Gengar after it had eaten {{DL|Master Dojo|Max Soup}}. Impressed by the sight, Bea remarked to Allister that it was rare for him to be helping others. In ''[[JN130|Toying With Your Motions!]]'', Bea watched Ash's match against Leon alongside Korrina and [[Gurkinn]]. In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Bea was shown having a training battle against [[Hop]], using Machamp to battle his {{p|Wooloo}} while Leon observed the match. [[File:Bea sweets.png|thumb|250x250px|Bea's soft spot for sweets]] ==== Character ==== Bea has a strong personality, and she hates losing. Through the strict training she endured from a very young age, Bea has developed discipline and a strong work ethic in both karate and Pokémon battles. She is also willing to push herself to the extreme in the name of self-betterment and improvement and expects the same of her Pokémon, but isn't above admitting she went too far if necessary. She has a soft spot for sweets and, though concealing her emotions during matches, feels strongly about many things and is known to show a more open side to her partner Pokémon. In her initial encounters with Ash, Bea did not acknowledge him properly, presumably due to him using Fighting-type Pokémon without proper training. She did, however, acknowledge that his Riolu had potential, resulting in her calling him "Riolu's Trainer". During their third encounter, when Riolu had evolved into Lucario, Bea admitted that she admired Ash's improvisation. After she lost to him, Bea finally acknowledged Ash properly, calling him by his name, indicating her respect towards him. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Bea's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Grapploct |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Grapploct.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Noriaki Kanze |vaen=James Weaver Clark |desc={{p|Grapploct}} is Bea's first known Pokémon. It was first used in her battle against the Karate Master and won after defeating his {{p|Hitmonchan}}. Grapploct then was Bea's second Pokémon in her [[World Coronation Series]] battle against {{Ash}}, where it went up against his {{AP|Riolu}}. Despite Riolu putting up a good fight, Grapploct won with relative ease. In ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', Grapploct battled [[Chuck]]'s {{p|Poliwrath}} before Ash arrived to have a [[rematch]] against Bea. It was the second Pokémon Bea used after {{p|Hitmontop}} lost to {{AP|Pikachu}}. Grapploct was able to defeat Pikachu before battling Riolu, with the match coming to a draw. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Grapploct was the first Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash. It first went up against Pikachu, who was soon switched out for {{AP|Lucario}} after both sides inflicted damage on each other. After a while, Grapploct was recalled and replaced with {{p|Hawlucha}}. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Grapploct was sent out to battle Pikachu, managing to defeat him before being defeated by Lucario. Grapploct's known moves are {{m|Detect}}, {{m|Close Combat}}, {{m|Liquidation}}, and {{m|Octolock}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Hawlucha |type1=Fighting |type2=Flying |img=Bea Hawlucha.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Ryota Iwasaki |vaen=H.D. Quinn |desc={{p|Hawlucha}} is Bea's second known Pokémon. She used it in her [[World Coronation Series]] battle against {{Ash}} in ''[[JN034|Solitary and Menacing]]'', where it went up against his {{AP|Farfetch'd}} and won. Afterwards, Hawlucha was recalled for {{p|Grapploct}}. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Hawlucha was the second Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash. It fought against his {{AP|Lucario}}, managing to inflict damage, but was soon switched out for {{p|Machamp}}. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Hawlucha was sent out to battle against {{AP|Sirfetch'd}}. Once again, it was able to defeat it, only to be beaten by {{AP|Pikachu}} afterwards. Hawlucha's known moves are {{m|Hone Claws}}, {{m|Karate Chop}}, {{m|Flying Press}}, {{m|High Jump Kick}}, {{m|Wing Attack}}, and {{m|Sky Attack}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Hitmontop |gender=male |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Hitmontop.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Kei Shindō |vaen= |desc={{p|Hitmontop}} is Bea's third known Pokémon. In ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', Bea used him as the first Pokémon in her rematch against Ash, where he went up against {{AP|Pikachu}}. Despite landing some damage, Hitmontop was eventually defeated. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Hitmontop was training alongside Bea's other Pokémon. During the encounter with Ash's Pokémon, Hitmontop ate some [[Poké Puff]]s alongside [[Ash's Dragonite]] and {{AP|Gengar}}. Hitmontop's known moves are {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Focus Energy}}, and {{m|Triple Kick}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Machamp |giga=yes |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Machamp.png |cap=Bea's Machamp |img2=Bea Machamp Gigantamax.png |cap2=Bea's Gigantamax Machamp |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp=Yasuhiro Mamiya |vaen= |desc={{p|Machamp}} first appeared in a flashback, along with Bea's other Pokémon. It is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Machamp was the third Pokémon Bea used in her second rematch with Ash, being sent out to battle his {{AP|Lucario}}, quickly gaining the upper hand. In ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', Ash switched Lucario out for {{AP|Sirfetch'd}}, whom Machamp battled for a while before being recalled. Later, Machamp was sent out to battle Lucario again. Bea Gigantamaxed Machamp in response to Ash using [[Mega Evolution]]. Lucario was able to survive Gigantamax Machamp's attacks until it reverted to normal, soon after which Machamp was defeated, making Ash the winner of the match. In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Machamp was used in Bea's training battle against [[Hop]], where it went up against his {{p|Wooloo}}. Machamp's known moves are {{m|Bullet Punch}}, {{m|Cross Chop}}, and {{m|Strength}}.
As a Gigantamax Machamp, it can use {{m|Max Steelspike}}, {{m|Max Strike}}, and {{m|G-Max Chi Strike}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Pangoro |type1=fighting |type2=dark |img=Bea Pangoro.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Pangoro}} first appeared along with Bea's other Pokémon in a flashback. In ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]'', Pangoro appeared training alongside Bea. During the meeting with Ash, Goh, and Korrina's Pokémon, Pangoro had a brief quarrel with [[Korrina's Lucario]]. None of Pangoro's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Falinks |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Falinks.png |epnum=JN085 |epname=Battle Three With Bea! |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Falinks}} appeared while training along with Bea's other Pokémon. None of Falinks's moves are known.}} =====Other===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bea |pkmn=Fighting-type Pokémon |type1=Fighting |img=Bea Pokémon anime.png |epnum=JN034 |epname=Solitary and Menacing! |vajp= |vaen= |desc=Bea owns many {{type|Fighting}} {{OBP|Pokémon|species}}. Among them, she has {{p|Throh}}, {{p|Tyrogue}}, {{p|Scraggy}}, {{p|Machop}}, {{p|Machoke}}, and {{p|Sawk}}.}} =====Traveling with===== {| width="50%" |- | {{ActivePoké|||nick=Rotom Phone|Bea Rotom Phone.png|electric|ghost|link=Rotom Phone}} | | |} ====Achievements==== =====Pokémon competitions===== ======World Coronation Series====== * Rank 751 (prior to ''[[JN034|Solitary and Menacing!]]''){{tt|*|Rises in rank after defeating Ash}} (Great Class) * Rank 193 (as of ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'') (Great Class) * Rank: Unknown (as of ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'') (Ultra Class) * Rank 30 (as of ''[[JN084|An Adventure of Mega Proportions!]]''){{tt|*|Drops in rank after losing to Ash in JN086}} (Ultra Class) ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{fighting color}}|bordercolor={{fighting color dark}} |ar=يمنى بو حنا ''Youmna Bou Hanna'' ([[JN034]]-[[JN085]])
